Package org.eventb.core.ast

Interface ISimpleVisitor

All Known Subinterfaces:
ISimpleVisitor2
All Known Implementing Classes:
DefaultSimpleVisitor, PredicateDecomposer, PredicateHeightComputer, WDComputer, WDImprover
public interface ISimpleVisitor
Simplified version of the visitor. This visitor does not support predicate variables. See IVisitor2. Here, the corresponding accept method only performs a call of the visit method. AST traversal must be managed within the visit methods of the implementer of this class.

This interface is intended to be implemented by clients who contribute new visitors.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • Formula.accept(ISimpleVisitor)
  • DefaultSimpleVisitor
